verdict.outlook: indexes range-bound, volatility normal, defensive sectors leading → mixed. No clear edge; wait for alignment before pressing.

missing.detail: rejection / reclaim candle in your direction

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF. Sector XLE is leading.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 21.3, 4th pct) — stops can tighten.

cycle.note: Institutional flow day (Tue/Thu rebalance & hedging) — entries tend to fill on real volume.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.label: Retest
entry_pullback.note: Limit: buy the retest of the broken level (now support); a hold/reclaim confirms.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

duration.valid_until: expected ~7 days, valid up to ~18 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~18 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

entries.label: Now · market
entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

entries.label: Retest · broken level (breakup held)
entries.plain: The level already broke and is holding — wait to buy the retest of it (now support) at a better price.

decision.reason: Long S/R Breakout with a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF bullish. Trigger and evidence agree.

cycle.note: Institutional flow day (Tue/Thu rebalance & hedging) — entries tend to fill on real volume.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.label: Bounce
entry_pullback.note: Limit: short a rally back into value/resistance; a rejection bar confirms.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

duration.valid_until: expected ~8 days, valid up to ~20 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~20 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

entries.label: Now · market
entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

entries.label: Pullback · better price
entries.plain: Wait for a bounce back into value for a better price and tighter risk — may never fill.

decision.reason: Short S/R Bounce against a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF neutral. Counter-trend — only valid with turn confirmation; size small, target the mean. Arms on: reclaim the last higher-low 85.46; volume ≥1.2× on the confirmation bar.

stop_preview.note: advisory preview — live stop unchanged (11b will anchor to structure)

alternative.note: Tape favors LONG — the short trigger has no turn confirmation yet.

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 21.3, 4th pct) — stops can tighten.

cycle.note: Institutional flow day (Tue/Thu rebalance & hedging) — entries tend to fill on real volume.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

duration.valid_until: expected ~3 days, valid up to ~8 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~8 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

entries.label: Now · market
entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

decision.reason: Short Mean Reversion into a strong bullish tape (83.3); higher-TF bullish with no turn confirmation. Knife-catch — stand aside; the long is the tape-aligned trade.

stop_preview.note: advisory preview — live stop unchanged (11b will anchor to structure)

candlestick_patterns.description: Bullish Engulfing — buyers completely overwhelmed sellers
Doji — indecision, potential reversal
Hammer — long lower shadow, bullish reversal signal
Pin Bar — strong rejection of lows
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
